scripts.build: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --minify --target=es2017 --outfile=dist/widget.js && node -e "const s=require('fs').statSync('dist/widget.js').size;if(s>5120){console.error('[LaunchLog] widget.js too large: '+s+' bytes (limit 5120)');process.exit(1)}else{console.log('[LaunchLog] widget.js: '+s+' bytes ✓')}"
